ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-19-2018 Continued To Jan-16-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Scott Hodges (Administrator).

The Court stated that it is looking for an inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution. Mr. Schultz stated that he was not aware of the inventory, that he thouht it was filed, that he has received the schedules and is working on the petition, that he expects to have it filed by the end of the year and requested a 30-day continuance. Status on close of estate is continued to January 16, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Chan. Not reported.
